modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Assistance needed for scheduling a Banner Admin process.

full_description_text: 
El usuario está intentando configurar un proceso de Banner Admin para que se ejecute de manera programada. Sin embargo, no está claro cómo proceder con la configuración en el software de Automic Scheduler. Se requiere asistencia para completar esta tarea.
short_description: Assistance needed for scheduling a Banner Admin process.
